name: contorium
description: Contorium: AI Project Intelligence Layer — capture, structure, preserve, retrieve and transfer project intelligence across IDE, MCP, and CLI.

commands.title: Contorium: Restore editors from saved state
Contorium: Start fresh AI context session (clear session events)

contora.maxRestoreEditors.description: Maximum editors to open when using "Restore editors from saved state" (0 = none).

contora.workingSetMaxFiles.description: Max paths in working set (recentFiles); counts focus/save only.

contora.defaultAIMode.description: Default AI mode for structured export (# MODE / instruction).

contora.exportFormat.description: Export: markdown / cursor fences / JSON (schema v2 Lite) / Claude framing / OpenAI messages JSON.

contora.exportDelivery.description: Where Export AI context goes: inject into the current Cursor/VS Code AI chat (default), copy to clipboard only, or both. Chat injection uses editor focus + paste — not an official API; press Enter to send after inject.

contora.governanceReviewScope.description: Governance review scope: auto merges current file, open files, git staged, and last commit; or restrict to one scope.

contora.persistEventLog.description: Append each workspace event to .contora/events/<sessionId>.jsonl (immutable log).

contora.autoAttachDashboard.description: When a folder workspace opens, auto-start the Contorium Dashboard CLI worker in a background terminal tab (Passive mode). Disable to stop auto-attach.

contora.maxPriorityFiles.description: Max ranked paths in # PRIORITY FILES / payload (capped by mode strategy).

contora.maxEventBuffer.description: Max session events kept in memory (ring buffer).

contora.eventsInPrompt.description: How many recent events to append under # RECENT EVENTS in export.

contora.exportTokenBudget.description: Approximate max tokens for “Copy AI-ready context”. Default 800. Contorium compresses locally toward ~500 first, allows up to ~800 without a model; if the export is still over ~800 tokens and exportLlmFallbackWhenOverBudget is on, one BYOK pass may tighten it. Set 0 for unlimited (expert). Any positive value is honored (no minimum clamp).

contora.exportLlmFallbackWhenOverBudget.description: When the markdown export is still over ~800 tokens after local shrinking, allow one BYOK completion to compress (requires contora.aiProvider ≠ off and a key). Turn off to skip that call; local shrinking and line trim still enforce contora.exportTokenBudget when it is finite.

contora.useDefaultIgnoreRules.description: Exclude noisy paths (node_modules, venv, .git, dist, …) from ranking, summary, export lists.

contora.extraIgnoreSubstrings.description: Extra path substrings to exclude (case-insensitive substring match on workspace-relative paths).

contora.mergeDiskEventLog.description: On workspace sync, merge JSONL events from disk into the in-memory ring buffer (same sessionId).

contora.writeLatestMemoryOnSave.description: After Save session state, also write .contora/memory/latest-memory.json (ranked memory mirror).

contora.aiProvider.description: Phase 3 BYOK: which LLM provider to use for on-demand semantic summary / intent / compression. Keys via "Contorium: Configure API key…" (SecretStorage only).

contora.openaiModel.description: OpenAI chat model id when contora.aiProvider is openai.

contora.openaiBaseUrl.description: OpenAI-compatible API base URL (no trailing slash).

contora.anthropicModel.description: Anthropic model id when contora.aiProvider is anthropic.

contora.googleModel.description: Gemini model id when contora.aiProvider is google.

contora.deepseekModel.description: DeepSeek chat model id when contora.aiProvider is deepseek (OpenAI-compatible API).

contora.deepseekBaseUrl.description: DeepSeek API base URL (OpenAI-compatible /v1/chat/completions; no trailing slash).

contora.aiMaxOutputTokens.description: Max completion tokens for BYOK AI calls (semantic / intent / compression).

contora.appendAiSummaryOnExport.description: When true, "Export AI context" may append an extra BYOK LLM semantic block (uses API quota). Off by default to avoid surprise cost.

contora.appendAiSummaryMinEvents.description: Minimum session events before an auto AI summary on export is attempted.

contora.appendAiSummaryCooldownMs.description: Minimum milliseconds between auto AI summaries on export for the same session fingerprint.

scripts.build:cli: npm run install:cli && node scripts/run-tsc.mjs packages/cli
scripts.build:mcp: npm run install:mcp && node scripts/clean-dist.mjs packages/mcp && node scripts/run-tsc.mjs packages/mcp
scripts.compile: node scripts/ensure-dev-deps.mjs && npm run version:sync && npm run build:runtime && npm run build:state-core && node scripts/materialize-deps-for-vsix.mjs && node scripts/ensure-dev-deps.mjs && npm run build:cli && npm run build:mcp && node scripts/run-tsc.mjs .
scripts.test: npm run build:state-core && npm run test:v3-core --prefix packages/state-core
